chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No.S-417 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge D/O Matter 1. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 6 a/w reply as at „A‟. 2. For hearing of CMA No.3533/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 02.06.2025 Mr. Abdul Basit Buriro, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Khan Khaskheli, AAG Sindh. SIP Imran Ali of PS Rizvia. ------------------------------- The petitioner through the instant petition has claimed the following relief: “It is, therefore, respectfully prayed that this Honorable Court may be pleased to; a. Direct the respondents No.2 to 4 to provide the legal protection to the petitioners and family members as well as well-wishers of the petitioner No.2 to save their lives from the hands of private respondent and their companions, the lives of the petitioners and family members of the petitioner No.2 under the great danger at the hands of private respondents they are continuously trying to find the petitioners for committing their murder in honor killing as a Karo Kari. b. Direct the respondent No.2 & 3 take legal action against the private respondent and also direct the respondent No.3 do not lodge any false FIR against the petitioners and family members of the petitioner No.2 and their well-wishers and not to arrest the petitioners without prior permission of this Honorable Court and also further direct to the respondent No.3 and private respondents to not unnecessary harass and extent threats of dire-consequences to the petitioners as well as family members and well-wishers of the petitioner No.2 c. Any other relief/relief(s), which this Honorable Court may deem fit and proper under the circumstances of the case.” The SP of Naushero Feroze / respondent No.4, SHO PS Moro / respondent No.3 and SHO PS Rizvi have filed their respective replies in which they have stated that no FIR has been registered against the petitioner to date and they will provide protection to the petitioner as and when it is required.

Direct the respondent No.2 & 3 take legal action against the private respondent and also direct the respondent No.3 do not lodge any false FIR against the petitioners and family members of the petitioner No.2 and their well-wishers and not to arrest the petitioners without prior permission of this Honorable Court and also further direct to the respondent No.3 and private respondents to not unnecessary harass and extent threats of dire-consequences to the petitioners as well as family members and well-wishers of the petitioner No.2 c. Any other relief/relief(s), which this Honorable Court may deem fit and proper under the circumstances of the case.” The SP of Naushero Feroze / respondent No.4, SHO PS Moro / respondent No.3 and SHO PS Rizvi have filed their respective replies in which they have stated that no FIR has been registered against the petitioner to date and they will provide protection to the petitioner as and when it is required. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with the undertaking given by the police officials and seek disposal of this petition. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of with no order as to costs alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
